message:
fix(conformance): text output format parity with bd

Updated text output formatting in CLI commands to match bd exactly:
- list.rs: Remove empty message and count line, match bd silent behavior
- ready.rs: Header '📋 Ready work...', line format '{idx}. [● P{n}] [type] ID: title'
- blocked.rs: Empty message '✨ No blocked issues'
- show.rs: Format '○ ID · Title [● P{n} · STATUS]' with Owner/Type/Date lines
- stats.rs: Header '📊 Issue Database Status', field alignment, footer message
- orphans.rs: Empty message '✓ No orphaned issues found'
- text.rs: format_priority_badge includes ●, format_issue_line_with has ' - ' separator

Test results improved from 123 passed/15 failed to 134 passed/4 failed.
Remaining 4 failures are behavioral differences (bd bugs in dep/close/status-filter).

Closes beads_rust-umu0

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
